project_type: Full-stack SaaS platform (React + Hono + Drizzle/Postgres) for Indian SMB CRM, WhatsApp marketing, and e-commerce
build_system: Vite (frontend) + tsx runtime (backend), npm scripts, single Render.com deploy
test_framework: Vitest + jsdom for frontend (virtually no tests exist - only 1 placeholder)
verification_instructions: This is an audit-only task - no code changes, only documentation output
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible
key_patterns: Hono routes with requireAuth middleware, Drizzle ORM queries, Better Auth for session management, in-memory rate limiting, AES-256-GCM encryption for secrets
directory_structure: server/ = backend (Hono + Drizzle + integrations), src/ = frontend (React + TanStack Query + shadcn/ui), public/ = static assets, scripts/ = DB migration helpers
